habilidadesResumidas.resumen: Air Mastery (Ex) Airborne creatures take a -1 penalty on attack and damage rolls against an air elemental.

habilidadesCompletas.texto: Air Mastery (Ex) Airborne creatures take a -1 penalty on attack and damage rolls against an air elemental.

fullStatBlock:

Large Air Elemental
